resources.string:
Name: SpaceShooters

Author: Lilian Chauvet

School: IUT of Laval, France

Year: 2026

Version: 1.0.0

Description : This game is a school project developed in kotlin with Android Studio

Game Rules:
You must destroy as many ships as possible before they cross the screen! Tap anywhere to shoot and aim the cannon by tilting your mobile device.
Destroy a ship makes you win one health point. Be careful: missing a shot or letting a ship pass will make you lose points! Do not let your score fall below 0, otherwise it\'s GAME OVER. You can reset the cannon\'s rotation by long-pressing on it.
